name: pleroma
tagline: A lightweight federated social network built on ActivityPub
description: Pleroma is a lightweight federated social network built using Elixir and Phoenix. It supports ActivityPub federation, custom themes, chat, and scalable self-hosted deployments.

features.title: Federated Social Networking
features.description: Run a social media server using ActivityPub

features.title: User Accounts
features.description: Create and manage local user profiles

features.title: Media Attachments
features.description: Attach images and files to posts

features.title: Self-Hosted Deployment
features.description: Run the social server on your own infrastructure
